title: Empire State Association of Disability Examiners (ESADE, New York) — Constitution and By-Laws
description: Governing constitution and by-laws of the Empire State Association of Disability Examiners (ESADE), a New York State chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE). Includes a preamble and covers chapter name, purpose, membership (persons involved in the New York State disability benefits program) and membership classes/rights, the Executive Board (President, President-Elect, Immediate Past-President, Secretary, Treasurer, Membership Chairman, ESADE News Editor) including recall procedure, meetings (bi-monthly), committees, conference voting procedure, parliamentary authority, and amendments; and in the by-laws: Executive Board duties, filling vacancies, duties of officers, standing committees, detailed election and absentee-balloting procedures, and amendments.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — New York / Empire State Chapter (ESADE)
source.title: Constitution and By-Laws of the Empire State Association of Disability Examiners (ESADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'NY-ESADE-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived (Article numbering restarts at the by-laws section and some emphasis markers are conversion artifacts). 'ESADE' = Empire State Association of Disability Examiners (one of multiple NY chapters; a separate NY-West chapter, NY-West-Const-Bylaws.doc, also exists). NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
